title: Golden Globes 2026: Female Actor Nominations Predictions
text: According to Casting Networks' female actor predictions by Neil Turitz for the 2026 Golden Globes, in the Television Drama Series category, Rhea Seehorn's recent momentum with "Pluribus" positions her ahead of Keri Russell, despite Russell's strong work in "The Diplomat." Turitz identifies the race as featuring strong competition from Britt Lower for "Severance," Kathy Bates for "Matlock," Helen Mirren for "Mobland," and Bella Ramsey for "The Last of Us." The predictions emphasize that momentum and recent cultural heat are playing a decisive role in television races, with Seehorn's drama win being discussed as a strong possibility among analysts.
